description_long: This is a stylized, chibi-style doll with a large, rounded head and small body proportions. The doll has straight, medium-length brown hair with bangs framing its face, and large expressive brown eyes. It is dressed in a form-fitting, dark green and white bodysuit with pink accents, resembling a futuristic or superhero costume. The hands are gloved in white, and the feet are covered with matching boots, both featuring pink details. The doll's arms are positioned close to its body, and its overall appearance is clean and well-defined, with smooth surfaces and cartoon-like features. The facial expression is gentle and friendly, with a slight smile and wide, open eyes.
description: A chibi-style doll with brown hair, large brown eyes, and a dark green and white bodysuit with pink accents. The doll has a friendly expression and a smooth, cartoon-like finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, large brown eyes, and the full detail of the bodysuit's front design.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the profile of the head, hair volume, and the side of the bodysuit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, hair, and the suit's back details with arms held behind.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the profile of the face, hair, and the side of the bodysuit.
attribute_clothing_style: Futuristic superhero-style bodysuit in dark green and white with pink accents, white gloves, and matching boots, inspired by anime and comic book hero costumes.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms held close to the body and hands together in front, legs straight and close together, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Gentle, friendly expression with a slight smile, wide open brown eyes, and relaxed eyebrows.
attribute_hair_style: Medium-length straight brown hair with bangs and slight layering around the face.
